title: Improved flow measurement apparatus and method of use
abstract: The invention provides an apparatus and method for measuring fluid flow rates. The apparatus comprises a meter body comprising a throughbore with a fluid flow path and a flow displacement member. The apparatus also provides a sleeve slidably mounted within the fluid flow path. The sleeve is configured to be movable between at least two axial positions within the fluid flow path to select a predetermined flow rate measurement range for the flow measurement apparatus.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A flow measurement apparatus comprising: a meter body comprising a throughbore with a fluid flow path; a flow displacement member; and a sleeve movably mounted within the fluid flow path; wherein the sleeve is configured to be movable between at least two axial positions within the fluid flow path and wherein the sleeve is configured to be set at different axial positions within the fluid flow path to select a predetermined flow rate measurement range for the flow measurement apparatus. 2. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 1 wherein the sleeve is configured to change an inner diameter of the fluid flow path. 3. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 1 or 2 wherein the sleeve is configured to move relative to the flow displacement member to change an inner diameter of the fluid flow path around the flow displacement member. 4. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the sleeve is configured to be slidably mounted within the fluid flow path. 5. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the sleeve has an annular shape. 6. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the sleeve has an entrance throat section and/or an exit throat section. 7. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 6 wherein the entrance and/or exit throat sections has an inclined or tapered profile. 8. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 6 wherein the entrance and/or exit throat sections has a stepped profile wherein the stepped profile comprise a series of steps. 9. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 8 wherein each step of the entrance throat section and/or an exit throat section has a predetermined diameter. 10. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the flow measurement apparatus is a pressure differential flow meter. 1 1. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the apparatus comprises a mechanism operable to effect axial movement of the sleeve between at least two axial positions within the fluid flow path to select a predetermined flow rate measurement range. 12. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 1 1 wherein the mechanism is configured to accurately control and/or set the position of the sleeve in the fluid flow path. 13. The flow measurement apparatus according claim 1 1 or claim 12 wherein the mechanism is located outside the fluid flow path. 14. The flow measurement apparatus according to any of claims 11 to 13 wherein a component of the mechanism extends into the fluid flow path to engage the sleeve. 15. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 14 wherein the meter body comprises an aperture configured to allow a component of the mechanism to extend into the fluid flow path to engage the sleeve. 16. The flow measurement apparatus according to any of claims 11 to 15 wherein the mechanism is manually, hydraulically, pneumatically, electrically or mechanically actuated. 17. The flow measurement apparatus according to any of claims 11 to 16 wherein the mechanism is selected from a linear motion, rotary motion, reciprocating motion and/or oscillating motion actuator. 18. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim any of claims 1 1 to 17 wherein the mechanism is configured to monitor and/or track the axial position of the sleeve in the fluid flow path. 19. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim any of claims 11 to 18 wherein the mechanism is coupled to an indicator and/or display to indicate the position of the sleeve. 20. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the sleeve is configured to be axially moved from a first position to at least a second position within the fluid flow path and wherein the sleeve is configured to at least partially enclose the flow displacement member when it is in the first or/and at least second position. 21. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the flow displacement member has a first diverging section and second converging section. 22. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 21 wherein the interface between diverging and converging section forms a peripheral edge. 23. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 22 wherein a first flow area and/or first beta ratio is defined by the diameter of the peripheral edge of the displacement member and an inner diameter of the fluid flow path of the meter body. 24. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 22 or claim 23 wherein a second flow area and/or first beta ratio is defined by the diameter of the peripheral edge of the displacement member and an inner diameter of the sleeve. 25. The flow measurement apparatus according to any of claims 22 to 24 wherein the diameter of the peripheral edge of the displacement member and the inner diameter of the fluid flow path, sleeve and/or a throat section of the sleeve define a flow area and/or beta ratio. 26. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the apparatus comprises a control unit. 27. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 26 wherein the control unit comprises adjustable settings for specific parameters selected from the fluid properties, fluid flow path dimensions, sleeve type, sleeve dimensions, mechanism type, flow pressure, differential pressure between an upstream and downstream of a displacement member and flow temperature. 28. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 26 or claim 27 wherein the control unit is configured to activate an alarm if the sleeve is in an incorrect axial position within the fluid flow path. 29. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the apparatus comprises at least one sensor to accurately detect and/or determine the position of the sleeve within the fluid flow path. 30. The flow measurement apparatus according to claim 29 wherein the at least one sensor includes selected from a potentiometer, ohmmeter, gauss meter, ultrasonic sensor or distance encoder. 31. The flow measurement apparatus according to any of claims 26 to 30 wherein the control unit is configured to receive information from the at least one sensor. 32. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the flow displacement member is positioned centrally in the fluid flow path. 33. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the flow displacement member is supported by at least one support member. 34. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the flow displacement member is a conical cone. 35. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the sleeve has an erosion resistant coating or layer. 36. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein seals are provided between the outer surface of the sleeve and the inner surface of the fluid flow path of the meter body to prevent fluid egress between the outer surface of the sleeve and the inner surface of the fluid flow path. 37. The flow measurement apparatus according to any preceding claim wherein the meter body comprises connectors to secure the apparatus to a section of pipe work. 38. A method of configuring a flow measurement apparatus comprising: providing a flow measurement apparatus comprising a meter body comprising a throughbore with a fluid flow path; a flow displacement member; and a sleeve movably mounted within the fluid flow path and configured to be set at different axial positions within the fluid flow path; moving the axial position of the sleeve within the fluid flow path from a first position to at least a second position to select a predetermined flow rate measurement range. 39. The method according to claim 38 comprising obtaining a beta ratio value for the flow measurement apparatus at the first and/or at least second position. 40. The method according to claim 38 or claim 39 comprising calculating a beta ratio value for a desired flow rate measurement and/or flow rate measurement range. 41. The method according to claim 40 comprising determining the axial position of the sleeve required to obtain the desired flow rate measurement and/or flow rate measurement range. 42. The method according to claim 41 comprising moving the axial position of the sleeve to the second position which is the determined axial position of the sleeve required to obtain the desired flow rate measurement and/or flow rate measurement range. 43. The method according to any of claims 39 to 42 comprising setting the axial position of the sleeve at the second position sleeve. 44. A method of operating a flow measurement apparatus comprising: providing a flow measurement apparatus comprising a meter body comprising a throughbore with a fluid flow path; a flow displacement member; a sleeve movably mounted within the fluid flow path and configured to be set at different axial positions within the fluid flow path; moving the sleeve between two axial positions within the fluid flow path to select a predetermined flow rate measurement range for the flow measurement apparatus and obtaining a beta ratio value for the flow measurement apparatus at a first and/or second axial position. 45. The method according to claim 44 comprising detecting and/or identifying the axial position of the sleeve within the fluid flow path at a first axial position and/or second position. 46. The method according to claim 44 or claim 45 comprising calculating the mass and volume flow rate of the fluid at a first and/or second axial position. 47. The method according to any of claims 44 to 46 comprising calculating a beta ratio value for a desired flow rate measurement and/or flow rate measurement range. 48. The method according to claim 47 comprising determining the axial position of the sleeve required to obtain the desired flow rate measurement and/or flow rate measurement range and moving the sleeve axially within the fluid conduit to an axial position within the fluid flow path to change the flow rate measurement range to the desired flow rate measurement range. 49. The method according to any of claims 44 to 48 comprising providing a mechanism operable to effect axial movement of the sleeve. 50. The method according to claim 49 comprising actuating the mechanism to move the sleeve axially within the fluid flow path between at least two axial positions within the fluid flow path to select a predetermined flow rate measurement range. 51. The method according to claim 49 or claim 50 comprising actuating the mechanism to move the sleeve axially within the fluid flow path to an axial position within the fluid flow path to change the flow rate measurement range to the desired flow rate measurement range. 52. A measurement apparatus substantially as described herein with reference to the appended drawings.
